title: NASA Sets Coverage for Artemis II Moon Mission
summary: Editor’s note: NASA will continuously update this Artemis II briefings and mission events page throughout prelaunch, launch, and mission activities. NASA will provide live coverage of prelaunch, launch, and mission events for the agency’s upcoming Artemis II crewed test flight around the Moon. title: NASA Names Jennifer Lyons as Acting Launch Services Program Manager
summary: NASA has selected Jennifer Lyons as acting program manager for the agency’s Launch Services Program (LSP) based at Kennedy Space Center in Florida. In this role, Lyons will lead NASA’s acquisition and management of domestic commercial launch services for science and robotic exploration missions beginning Wednesday, April 1. Lyons will oversee mission planning, launch vehicle […]

title: Office of Space Commerce releases mission authorization proposal
summary:
The Office of Space Commerce has rolled out its proposal for a “light touch” approach to mission authorization, the latest attempt in an effort to regulate new commercial space applications.

summary: Saturn’s icy rings glow in this infrared view from NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope released on March 25, 2026. title: NASA Webb, Hubble Share Most Comprehensive View of Saturn to Date
summary: NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope and Hubble Space Telescope have teamed up to capture new views of Saturn, revealing the planet in strikingly different ways. Observing in complementary wavelengths of light, the two space observatories provide scientists with a richer, more layered understanding of the gas giant’s atmosphere.
